changelog: Multi-provider architecture: CoinGecko, Binance, Kraken, CoinPaprika
Provider selector strip — switch data source with one click
CoinGecko set as default (free, global, no geo-restrictions)
Binance uses data.binance.com + api.binance.us as fallback (fixes HTTP 451)
Removed unreliable allorigins CORS proxy — Electron net module used natively
New dedicated Settings panel — all config in one place
Toggle always-on-top, sound, refresh interval from Settings
Config schema v2 with automatic migration from v1
Improved status bar with animated LED indicator
